useful_outputs: Seed intake/contract materialized to required Foundry paths
Token JSON and token CSS export aligned with style mix
Playwright screenshot evidence set and schema-driven validation report
Final owner report and receipt package
waste_points: One validation pass ran concurrently with screenshot generation and produced a temporary false BLOCK before sequential rerun.
missing_tools: Single command that enforces phase ordering for screenshot->validation to avoid race conditions
recommended_script_absorption: Absorb validate_artifacts.py as reusable Visual Foundry minimal schema checker
Absorb capture_screenshots.mjs as baseline proof runner
future_prompt_improvements: Explicitly state whether pre-existing artifacts from previous task in same folder should be preserved or replaced.
Include required screenshot filenames in task spec json to reduce naming ambiguity.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add explicit checklist item: do not run validation in parallel with screenshot generation.
